news.title: OpenAI says GPT 5.6 is the ‘preferred model’ for Microsoft Copilot 365 amid breakup chatter
news.summary: OpenAI's new family of models will continue to power Microsoft's suite of workplace and productivity apps.

news.title: Don’t want to invest in Elon Musk? Two new ETFs explicitly exclude him
news.summary: The new exchanged-traded funds exclude companies that are founded, controlled, or led by Elon Musk. That means no SpaceX or Tesla.

news.title: Fidji Simo steps down from OpenAI’s no. 2 role
news.summary: OpenAI's No. 2 executive, Fidji Simo, is stepping down from her full-time role after her medical leave proved longer than expected — a leadership vacuum that comes at a tricky time as the company eyes a possible IPO and races to catch Anthropic in the enterprise market.

news.title: OpenAI launches its new family of models with GPT-5.6
news.summary: OpenAI's latest family of models promises improvements across a range of areas, including cybersecurity.

news.title: An AI agent startup just let its agent run its $100M fundraise
news.summary: Lyzr, a startup that builds AI agents for enterprises, used its own AI agent to raise a $100 million round — proof, evidently, that the product actually works.

news.title: Microsoft’s carbon emissions went up 25 percent last year
news.summary: Microsoft may once again be struggling to keep up with its own climate goals, according to its 2026 sustainability report. news.title: Netflix reportedly considers adding always-on channels
news.summary: Netflix is thinking about adding always-on channels that would stream specific shows and movies, according to The Wall Street Journal. news.title: The ChatGPT browser is already dead
news.summary: OpenAI is already shutting down ChatGPT Atlas, its browser that could do tasks for you on your behalf, less than a year after launching it.
